name: Hitler Didi
overview: Hitler Didi or General Didi is a daily Indian soap opera that aired on Zee TV. It premiered on November 7, 2011. The story is located in the backdrop of Delhi. It airs in Pakistan on Express Entertainment.

trailers.title: हिटलर दीदी -  सोम-रवि, शाम 4 बजे - Promo - जी अनमोल
